# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] UI/visual polish
- [ ] Gameplay improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Testing

- [ ] Tested locally with `python3 -m http.server 8000`
- [ ] Checked desktop browser
- [ ] Checked mobile or responsive layout if relevant
- [ ] Confirmed no intentional server/log files are included

## Notes

Add anything Xollonox should know before reviewing.
